_comment: Phase 3 STAGED reconcile candidates - prepared by the session, approved ONLY by a human in the Map client panel. Nothing here is written to the sync map until a human ticks + approves (POST /api/central/reconcile/Cloudflare/approve). Evidence pulled 2026-07-22 from raw_snowflake (read-only). LinkedIn values are CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME tokens (see central-clients.json note); TTD/Reddit values are CAMPAIGN_NAME tokens. 'preview' = whole-history BQ totals for the rule at pull time.
platformAudit: RE-STAGED 2026-07-22 after the platform-crossing review: all 14 pairs re-checked under the hard platform-consistency rule (BQ-name token LINKEDIN/TTD/REDDIT/LINE-as-token + source-table channel tag, both must match the Grid row's channel) - 14/14 pass; every BQ name each rule matches carries the token of its pair's platform. The pre-Phase-3 generic matcher preselected 18/72 cross-platform (the reported bug); the matcher now hard-filters candidates by platform and the approve route rejects any crossing outright.
warnings: TTD COSTS is the CLIENT-BILLED basis (verified: Q2 Core DG SUM(COSTS) $87,583 vs sheet clientSpend $85,252 / budget $86,826; Schneider Airset cross-check $2,798 to 07-08 vs billed $2,650). The 3 TTD rows carry spendMult 3.07-3.59, so the first sync would set clientSpend = billed x mult (~3.5x too high). BEFORE the first sync: set spendMult to 1 on the 3 TTD rows (Q2 Core DG, Q3 Core DG, Surround ABM) or leave them unmapped. Same landmine applies to Schneider's already-validated map - flagged in the Phase 3 report.
Most Cloudflare rows are Ended: the sync skips Ended rows by default. To backfill them once, run POST /api/central/sync?includeEnded=1 (the Sync now button does not pass it).

Q2 Core DG - LinkedIn: the staged rule (contains CORE-DG, 6 groups, $44,304) EXCLUDES the VER-PUBSEC group ($1,225) - but the sheet's figure ($45,522) appears to INCLUDE it (gap $1,218 = PUBSEC within $7). One contains-rule cannot span both. Options: approve as staged and add a separate PUBSEC row (cleanest), or accept the $1.2k gap. Human decision - do not force.

pairs.rationale: Matches both LinkedIn group vintages (plain + 2446_ prefix, same 2 campaigns). Spend to 07-21 $11,113; sheet $8,678 at ~07-08 vintage - consistent.
One group, ended. BQ $6,227 vs sheet $6,225 (0.03% diff).
One group, ended. BQ $13,051 vs sheet $13,050.
One group, ended. BQ $13,054 vs sheet $13,050.
One group (6 campaigns), ended. BQ $26,105 vs sheet $26,099 (0.02% diff). Group grain is what makes PEYC expressible at all - no campaign-name token separates it from ANZ Core DG.

6 groups (ANZ/ASEAN/SIM/ROA/IN/HK-CORE-DG), $44,304 - vs sheet $45,522. Gap $1,218 = the VER-PUBSEC group ($1,225) the sheet apparently folded in but this rule excludes (see warning). Token does NOT collide with Q3's COREDG-Q3 (hyphen differs).
8 groups (2 name vintages x ANZ/ASEAN/IN/HK), $13,955 to 07-21. Sheet $2,029 is the stale ~07-08 vintage - expect a jump on first sync.
Exact name; BQ $7,920 = budget $7,920 to the dollar (ended). No spendMult on this row - billed basis is safe.
Exact name; BQ $11,880 = budget $11,880 to the dollar (ended). No spendMult - safe.

Name does not say Coles, but: BQ $9,900 = budget $9,900 to the dollar, the May 4-31 flight matches exactly, and it is the ONLY TTD name not claimed by another rule (49/49 covered, zero overlap). No spendMult - safe.

21 names (2103_ prefixed + unprefixed vintages), $87,583 vs budget $86,826 - membership certain. WARNING: row carries spendMult 3.5145 on a billed-basis COSTS feed - resolve spendMult before first sync (see warnings).
15 names (2479_ prefixed + unprefixed), $8,826 to date, active. WARNING: spendMult 3.074 on billed-basis COSTS - resolve before first sync.
10 names (2193_ prefixed + unprefixed), $4,833 to date, active. WARNING: spendMult 3.586 on billed-basis COSTS - resolve before first sync.

AMBIGUOUS - flagged, not forced: Reddit has exactly 2 BQ campaigns, from two different briefs (CNC retargeting $1,811 + MDS SHADOW-AI awareness $8,451 = $10,262 vs sheet $9,891, ~4% over). The sheet row appears to span BOTH; approve only if you agree SHADOW-AI belongs to Q2 Core DG, else approve an exact rule on the CNC name only.

unmatchableGridRows.reason: No LINE table exists in the BQ raw layer - LINE is a manual LINE-Ad-Manager CSV seed (client_cloudflare.seed_line_cf, JPY converted in the dashboard). Cannot be BQ-synced; stays sheet-valued. Not matched across platforms.

No Cloudflare Google Ads presence in the BQ raw layer (raw_snowflake.google_ads_apac accounts are STT-only; the DTS raw_google_ads layer covers 100% Digital clients). Row is Paused with no spend/start. Stays sheet-valued. Not matched across platforms.

unmatchedBq.note: VER-PUBSEC group (2 campaigns, Apr 1 - May 28, ended) has NO Grid row. Evidence says the sheet folded it into Q2 Core DG LinkedIn (gap math in warnings). Recommend: Add campaign row 'PubSec' + map contains ANZ-PUBSEC, or accept the documented gap.
